A-Level Further Mathematics

Core Pure 1 & 2

These booklets contain compiled exam questions from the Edexcel Further Mathematics specification, strictly sorted by topic (Matrices, Complex Numbers, Vectors, etc).

    Key points:

  • Please check the box upon completing a topic. I recommend using one device and a non-private browsing mode to ensure your progress is saved.
  • Arranged by difficulty: Questions start with routine calculations and progress to complex, synoptic modeling problems.
  • Aim to complete every question. The harder questions often combine multiple topics (e.g., using Matrices to solve Differential Equations).
Further Maths Formula Booklet

My Progress

This feature requires js 😔

Core Pure

AS-Level Year 1

  • Calculus
  • Complex Numbers
  • Further Algebra
  • Matrices
  • Proof
  • Vectors

A-Level Year 2

  • Calculus
  • Complex Numbers
  • Differential Equations
  • Further Algebra
  • Hyperbolic Functions
  • Matrices
  • Polar Coordinates
  • Proof
  • Vectors

Further Stats 1

AS-Level Year 1

  • Chi Squared Tests
  • Discrete Probability Distributions
  • Hypothesis Testing
  • Poisson & binomial distributions

A-Level Year 2

  • Central Limit Theorem
  • Chi Squared Tests
  • Discrete probability distributions
  • Geometric and negative binomial distributions
  • Hypothesis Testing
  • Poisson & binomial distributions
  • Probability generating functions
  • Quality of tests
